data.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Settle At Record High Levels: Investor Sentiment Edges Lower, But Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index recorded a slight decrease in market sentiment, remaining in the "Greed" territory on Friday. U.S. stocks closed with mixed results, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite hitting record highs. The previous week saw varied performances, with the S&P 500 up by about 0.6% and the Nasdaq surging by 1.5%, while the Dow declined by 0.4%. Pakistan indicated potential ceasefire discussions with Iran's foreign minister in Islamabad, alleviating some energy-related pressures. Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) shares soared over 23% following a strong first-quarter financial report and a second-quarter guidance surpassing expectations. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Share repurchase programme: Transactions of week 17 2026
data.description: Starting from 5 February 2026 and until 29 January 2027, Jyske Bank will be implementing a share repurchase programme, with intentions to acquire shares valued at a maximum of DKK 3 billion. This initiative, as outlined in Corporate Announcement No. 11/2026 released on 5 February 2026, is in line with the stipulations of the Market Abuse Regulation (EU Regulation No 596/2014) and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 dated 8 March 2016, collectively referred to as the "Safe Harbour Rules."

data.title: Foremost Hat Launches California Showroom Offering In-Person Selection and Same-Day Pickup
data.description: A new B2B showroom by Foremost Hat has been established in City of Industry, Southern California. This showroom provides wholesale clients with the opportunity to physically access blank hats, avail same-day pickup, and receive local warehouse assistance for large orders. The convenience of being able to inspect materials, fit, and styles in person alleviates common challenges faced when ordering online. Featured products include structured caps, trucker hats, and a variety of others. The showroom, spanning 19,196 square feet, houses an extensive inventory of over 200,000 units comprising 800+ SKUs, catering to businesses seeking bulk purchases.

data.title: LTC hit by rare 13-block reorg due to zero-day bug, sparking debate on transaction finality and network security.
data.description: Litecoin recently addressed a zero-day bug that caused a notable 13-block chain reorganization. This incident has sparked worries regarding transaction security and network stability.

data.title: Notice of calling the annual general meeting of Hepsor AS
data.description: The board of directors of Hepsor AS (registration number 12099216, located at Järvevana tee 7b, 10112 Tallinn, Estonia) has announced the convening of the annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 11:00. The meeting will take place at the Mövenpick Hotel Tallinn conference centre, situated at Lembitu St. 12, Tallinn. Participant registration will commence at 10:30 on the day of the meeting. Shareholders are encouraged to arrive early to allow for registration procedures.

data.title: Omdia: Mainland China Cloud Infrastructure Spending Rises 26% in Q4 2025, Driven by AI and Agent Growth
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Mainland China saw a significant increase in spending on cloud infrastructure services, reaching $14.7 billion, which represented a 26% rise compared to the previous year. This growth marked the third consecutive quarter where spending had increased by more than 20%, indicating a continuous acceleration in the market. Looking towards the future, research by Omdia suggests that China's expenditure on cloud infrastructure services is projected to expand by another 26% in 2026. During Q4 2025, the primary driver of this growth was identified as AI, which not only contributed to the market's expansion but also had a wider-reaching impact beyond model-related activities.
